almbark2015.title: Acoustic analysis of the Syrian Arabic vowel system
almbark2015.pagination: The ICPhS 2015 proceedings paper carries no printed folio; `page` records the paper-internal page (1-5), which coincides with the PDF page index.
almbark2015.describes: Damascene / Syrian Arabic (speakers from Damascus and coastal Syria)

jasim2020.title: Tafxi:m in the vowels of Muslawi Qəltu and Baghdadi Gilit dialects of Arabic
jasim2020.pagination: Printed folio is centred/right in the page footer; printed page = pdftotext page index − 23 (verified on the Abbreviations page and on body pages 17, 18, 37).
jasim2020.describes: Baghdadi Gilit (Muslim Baghdad) and Muslawi Qəltu (Mosul)

fadda2016.title: Language Variation in Western Amman
fadda2016.venue: MA thesis, Canada Institute of Linguistics
fadda2016.pagination: Printed folio is in the page header and coincides with the PDF page index (verified on pages 15, 29, 30, 33).

cotter2016.title: One Piece of the Puzzle: Notes on the Historic Interdental Fricatives /θ, ð, ðˤ/ in the Arabic Dialect of Gaza City
cotter2016.venue: Journal of Arabic and Islamic Studies 16:149-162
cotter2016.pagination: Printed folio in the running head (`Historic /θ, ð, ðˤ/ in Gaza Arabic  <n>`); the article runs 149-162.

pompino2017.authors: Pompino-Marschall, B., Steriopolo, E. & Żygis, M.
pompino2017.title: Ukrainian (Illustrations of the IPA)
pompino2017.venue: Journal of the International Phonetic Association 47(3):349-357
pompino2017.pagination: Printed folio in the running head; the article runs 349-357. The word list is on printed page 351 (PDF page index 3).
pompino2017.describes: Standard Ukrainian; the speaker was born in Bukovina and educated in Kyiv

yanushevskaya2015.title: Russian (Illustrations of the IPA)
yanushevskaya2015.venue: Journal of the International Phonetic Association 45(2):221-228
yanushevskaya2015.pagination: Printed folio in the running head; the article runs 221-228. The consonant word list is on printed page 222 (PDF page index 2).

cruzferreira1995.title: European Portuguese (Illustrations of the IPA)
cruzferreira1995.venue: Journal of the International Phonetic Association 25(2):90-94
cruzferreira1995.pagination: Printed folio in the running head; the article runs 90-94. The word lists are on printed page 91 (PDF page index 2). The PDF is a scan with an unreliable text layer — the rows were transcribed from a render of the page, not from pdftotext.
cruzferreira1995.describes: European Portuguese, Lisbon dialect (cited by the pt-PT and pt-PT-x-lisbon specs)

barbosa2004.title: Brazilian Portuguese (Illustrations of the IPA)
barbosa2004.venue: Journal of the International Phonetic Association 34(2):227-232
barbosa2004.pagination: Printed folio in the running head; the article runs 227-232. The consonant word list is on printed page 228 (PDF page index 2). The text layer mangles the IPA, so the rows were transcribed from a render of the page.
barbosa2004.describes: Brazilian Portuguese (the variety illustrated has dental affrication before [i]); cited by the pt-BR and pt-BR-x-sp specs

brissos2014.title: New insights into Portuguese central-southern dialects: understanding their present and past forms through acoustic data from stressed vowels
brissos2014.pagination: Printed folio in the running head (`66  Fernando Brissos` / `Portuguese central-southern dialects  67`).
brissos2014.describes: Portuguese central-southern dialects: CI = the central-interior subdialect (Castelo Branco / Beira Baixa); SW = the southwestern subdialect (Baixo Alentejo / Alentejo littoral)
